heading: Attorney fees
label: 285 Attorney fees
text: The court in exceptional cases may award reasonable attorney fees to the prevailing party.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on Title 35, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 70, part (R.S. 4921, amended (1) , , (2) , , (3) , ).Mar. 3, 1897, ch. 391, § 629 Stat. 694Feb. 18, 1922, ch. 58, § 842 Stat. 392Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 726, § 160 Stat. 778This section is substantially the same as the corresponding provision in R.S. 4921; “in exceptional cases” has been added as expressing the intention of the present statute as shown by its legislative history and as interpreted by the courts.
